query:
SELECT af.id, af.feedbackType, LEFT(af.explanation, 120) as explanation_preview, af.status, af.createdAt, u.name as userName
FROM ai_feedback af
LEFT JOIN users u ON af.userId = u.id
WHERE af.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY af.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT af.id, af.feedbackType, LEFT(af.explanation, 120) as explanation_preview, af.status, af.createdAt, u.name as userName
FROM ai_feedback af
LEFT JOIN users u ON af.userId = u.id
WHERE af.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY af.createdAt DESC;

rows.explanation_preview: Daniel could have more explicitly set expectations at the beginning of the call, detailing the call structure and comfor
No use in qualifying thoroughly, manufactured home fully remodeled and was going to list, not in buybox
I already had notes from previous conversation on his number, the texting leads sometimes come in with more information
We would not be anywhere near his number and no motivation whatsoever
Daniel should have explicitly set expectations at the beginning of the call, stating the call structure and comfort with
When introducing the call, Daniel could have used the 'I probably caught you at a bad time' phrase to confirm availabili
